pi_items.source: Task setup script specifically downloads and saves the file to this exact path.
Python rasterio execution confirms the download URL originates from github.com/leftfield-geospatial/homonim and the image contains 3 bands with Sentinel-2A spacecraft tags.

privileged_info_summary: The task uses real Sentinel-2 satellite data (Sentinel-2A, product ID S2A_MSIL1C_20151003T075826_N0204_R035_T35HKC_20151003T082014) downloaded from the leftfield-geospatial/homonim repository on GitHub. The data contains 3 bands corresponding to RGB (B4, B3, B2) and is saved to the expected local path /home/ga/snap_data/sentinel2_b432.tif.
